message:
Pi,cli: Make logging dev-only and use /tmp/agentlogs.log

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/kjemkzj44fh82yzpexknurn9

files.patch:
@@ -109,11 +109,11 @@ unset AGENTLOGS_CLI_PATH
 
 ## Debug Logging
 
-Debug logs are written to `/tmp/agentlogs-pi.log` when not in production mode.
+Debug logs are written to `/tmp/agentlogs.log` when not in production mode.
 
 ```bash
 # Watch logs in real-time
-tail -f /tmp/agentlogs-pi.log
+tail -f /tmp/agentlogs.log
 ```
 
 ## CLI Commands

@@ -43,4 +43,4 @@ echo ""
 echo "  AGENTLOGS_CLI_PATH=\"$CLI_PATH\" pi"
 echo ""
 echo "Done! The extension will be loaded automatically when you start pi."
-echo "Debug logs are written to: /tmp/agentlogs-pi.log"
+echo "Debug logs are written to: /tmp/agentlogs.log"
